title: Index Management on Informix
text: Index Management on Informix Non-unique indexes are created at table creation time, either on-the-fly or by running SQL scripts generated by the Create Table facility. For more information, see Informix Data Packing . Informix OL uses a partition to store index information. Depending on the system, this partition page is 2 KB or 4 KB in size. The upper limit for the number of indexes per table is 100. Index names Index names consist of the table name, followed by an index number: TableName N . For example, a table named ‘test’ with an index number of 2, has the index name test2 . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
